key_risks: A sudden reversal in technology and semiconductor momentum.
Geopolitical tensions affecting semiconductor supply chains, particularly in Taiwan.
Unexpected hawkish shifts in interest rate expectations impacting growth stock valuations.

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum and structural AI tailwinds support continued outperformance over a short horizon.
Provides broad exposure to large-cap tech and growth, which are currently leading the market.
Core benchmark holding to manage active risk while maintaining exposure to the broader US equity market.

portfolio_rationale: The portfolio leans heavily into the strong momentum seen in the technology and semiconductor sectors, which have significantly outperformed recently. The S&P 500 allocation serves as a stabilizing core to manage active risk against the benchmark.
rationale_summary: Overweighting high-momentum tech and semiconductors while maintaining a core S&P 500 position.
